text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, August 10. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Let's get that resolved. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
